summary: End-to-end testing of Sejal Creation. Backend: 16/17 pytest tests pass (the 1 failure is a test-side casing issue — server correctly lowercases emails). Frontend: All critical flows verified — home loads with marquee/categories/featured/WA float, /shop lists 17 products, product detail has Add-to-Cart & WA-order buttons, cart shows totals, checkout has all addr-* testids, PIN 443101 enables COD radio (cod_enabled_443101=True), admin login with sejal2402/Adishakti redirects to /admin and dashboard renders KPI cards + sales-7d chart + best-selling chart, rental page lists rental items.

minor.issue: allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=False is fine for Bearer auth but Google session sets cookie with samesite=none — cookie will be ignored by browsers if origins are wildcarded with credentials elsewhere. Not impacting current flows.
Anonymous users can place orders (user is optional). Acceptable per spec but no rate limiting.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin sidebar after login appears to only show 'Dashboard' link in screenshot — Products / Orders / Rentals / Customers nav items expected by spec not visible in initial render. Needs verification by main agent.

action_items: Verify admin sidebar shows Products / Orders / Rentals / Customers / Content nav links (only Dashboard visible in screenshot capture).
Optional: tighten CORS allow_origins to known origins if cookie-based auth is desired.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~800 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, products, orders, admin) for maintainability.
seed_admin correctly re-syncs password if env changed — good idempotent behavior.
All endpoints exclude _id via projection — clean.
Email normalized to lowercase on register/login — consistent.
JWT secret read from env — good.
test_credentials: Admin: sejal2402 / Adishakti (verified working). Customer: created dynamically per-test.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 17 demo products, 1 admin user, homepage content on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py covers products, auth, pincode, orders (CRUD + COD validation), admin (dashboard, orders, status, product CRUD), rentals, google-session 401. Use pytest with --junitxml. Admin login via /api/auth/admin-login uses {identifier, password}. PIN 443101 is the only COD pincode.
